## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewed my own diff.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for observable behavior.
- [ ] I ran `make check` successfully.
- [ ] I updated both English and Chinese documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, proprietary source, generated reports, or build artifacts.
- [ ] This change preserves the read-only security boundary, or its intentional change was discussed in the linked issue.
